title: AN ACT REPEALING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN  HUNDRED SEVENTY-FIVE

chunks.text:
H. No. 310 / 55 OG No. 34, 6973 (August 24, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2401, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT REPEALING REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED NINETEEN HUNDRED SEVENTY-FIVE

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Repesentatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Republic Act Numbered Nineteen hundred seventy-five, entitled âAn act to grant to Amador Dayola and R. Mulet (partners) a franchise for an electric light, heat and power in the Municipality of Panabo, Province of Davao,â is hereby repealed.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
